about.metaDescription: I am a frontend engineer focused on React and TypeScript, with strong interest in web performance and user experience.
about.intro: I work on the parts of a frontend that wobble: behavior that depends on the browser, the small differences a runtime creates, and the seams where code starts to be hard to read again. I would rather write something a future reader can understand than something that ships a week earlier.

ea.highlight1: Cut weekly QA reproduction and log requests from 10 to 3 by keeping URL state in sync with the UI.
ea.highlight2: After redesigning the item version-management flow, similar deployment issues dropped to zero.
ea.highlight3: Sole frontend owner of the operations tool: stack selection, QA collaboration, and documentation.

nhn.highlight1: Built reservation flows for high-traffic events including KBO Opening Day and the Korean Series.
nhn.highlight2: Unified JSP-based multilingual pages into a single React + i18next codebase.
nhn.highlight3: Blocked non-eligible users from entering booking flows via fan-club-tier and team-policy filtering.

pandora.highlight1: Improved Lighthouse SEO score from 56 to 82 using dynamic meta injection in EJS templates.
pandora.highlight2: Developed a hybrid-app WebView flow for community and product purchase journeys.
pandora.highlight3: Proposed and implemented @mention support end-to-end, including notification integration.

openSource.heading: Merged open-source work
openSource.lead: Pull requests to TanStack Query, React Router, and a few others that landed in official releases.

query.pr1Title: Optimized useQueries from O(N²) to O(N)
query.pr1Desc: Reduced function calls in the 500-query benchmark from 4,500 to 2,000 (about -55%).
query.pr2Desc: Resolved stale UI after page refresh.
query.pr3Desc: Stabilized a mismatch in the Nx Cloud distributed execution config.

router.pr2Desc: Added safe handling for session save failures in private mode.
router.pr3Desc: Added regression tests for SSR environments.
router.pr5Desc: Addressed CDN CORS CSS preload issues.

rhf.pr1Desc: Resolved the never-lock issue and added type tests.

tsr.pr1Desc: Changed 500 to 404 behavior and added tests.

stack.heading: What I reach for
stack.line: React, TypeScript, and Next.js as a base. TanStack Query, React Router, and Zustand for state and routing. Vite, Vitest, Playwright, and ESLint to keep build and tests honest. Node, Fastify, Prisma, and tRPC when I need a backend.

meta.stackLine: React · TypeScript · Next.js · TanStack Query · React Router · Vite · Vitest · Playwright · Node · Fastify · Prisma · tRPC
